problem_solved: Pharmaceutical supply chain serialization, compliance, and track-and-trace requirements
solution_description: World's largest digital supply chain network for life sciences. OPUS platform enables end-to-end serialization, track-and-trace, and supply chain orchestration with AI agents. 291,000+ network partners.
notes: Critical infrastructure for drug serialization compliance. Network effects create moat. Competes with SAP ATTP, Systech.
